Overview

Choosing between n8n and Tray.io is a common dilemma for professionals looking for the right solution. Both platforms have carved out significant market positions, but they take notably different approaches to solving similar problems. In this comprehensive comparison, we analyze every aspect that matters — from features and pricing to user experience and support — so you can make an informed decision.

Feature Analysis

Both n8n and Tray.io share a solid foundation of core features including Visual Builder, Code Support, Api Connections, Scheduling. Interestingly, both platforms offer nearly identical feature sets. The difference lies more in the implementation quality and depth of each feature rather than feature availability itself. Looking at user ratings, n8n holds an overall score of 8/10 and an ease of use score of 6/10, while Tray.io scores 8/10 overall and 5/10 for ease of use. These ratings reflect real user experiences and can indicate differences in usability, support quality, and overall satisfaction.

Pricing Breakdown

When it comes to pricing, both n8n and Tray.io offer flexible pricing models. n8n has a notable advantage here with its free plan, allowing you to get started without any financial commitment. Tray.io does not currently offer a free tier, which means you will need to pay from day one.

Pros & Cons

n8n

  • Self-hostable and fair-code licensed
  • No per-task pricing limits
  • Excellent for developers with code nodes

Cons

  • -Requires technical skills to self-host
  • -Smaller integration library than Zapier
  • -Community support can be inconsistent

Tray.io

  • Handles extremely complex enterprise workflows
  • Strong governance and security features
  • Excellent connector ecosystem

Cons

  • -Very expensive—enterprise pricing only
  • -Overkill for small teams
  • -Steep learning curve

Who Should Choose Which?

The ideal user for each platform differs considerably. n8n is best suited for developers, self hosters, privacy conscious teams, making it a strong choice if you fall into any of these categories. Tray.io, meanwhile, shines for enterprises, revenue operations, IT teams, which means it may be the better pick if your needs align with those use cases. Founded in 2019, n8n describes itself as "Fair-code workflow automation platform with self-hosting option." Tray.io, established in 2012, positions itself as "Enterprise automation platform for complex business process orchestration." With 7 years between them, Tray.io brings the maturity and proven track record of a veteran platform, while n8n offers the fresh perspective and modern architecture of a newer entrant.

Our Verdict

After analyzing all the data, **n8n** comes out slightly ahead in this comparison, thanks to availability of a free plan. However, this does not mean Tray.io is a poor choice — far from it. Tray.io excels in its own right, particularly for enterprises and revenue operations. Our recommendation: if you value self-hostable and fair-code licensed, go with n8n. If handles extremely complex enterprise workflows matters more to you, Tray.io is the way to go. Either way, both are solid platforms that have earned their place in the market.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is n8n better than Tray.io?
It depends on your needs. n8n scores 8.0 overall while Tray.io scores 8.0. n8n is best for developers and self-hosters, while Tray.io excels for enterprises and revenue operations.
Which is cheaper, n8n or Tray.io?
n8n starts at Free and Tray.io starts at Custom. n8n offers a free plan. Overall value depends on which features you need.
Can I switch from n8n to Tray.io?
Yes, most users can migrate between these platforms. Both n8n and Tray.io support data import/export. The migration process typically involves exporting your data from one platform and importing it into the other. Some tools also offer migration assistance to make the transition smoother.
What do users say about n8n vs Tray.io?
On review platforms, n8n holds an overall rating of 8/10 and an ease of use score of 6/10. Tray.io has an overall rating of 8/10 and ease of use score of 5/10. Users praise n8n for self-hostable and fair-code licensed and Tray.io for handles extremely complex enterprise workflows.
Which should I choose in 2026, n8n or Tray.io?
In 2026, we recommend n8n for most users based on its overall score and feature set. However, Tray.io remains a strong contender, especially if you prioritize handles extremely complex enterprise workflows. Try both free trials before committing.
